RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprotobj/ISchemaProtSchemaObj.java

GenFile.Name: fileISchemaProtSchemaObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower DefProtSchemaName$/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower DefProtSchemaName$obj

RuleSet.GenRule: public I$ProtSchemaName$Schema get$DefProtSchemaName$BackingStore(); public void set$DefProtSchemaName$BackingStore(I$ProtSchemaName$Schema $lower DefProtSchemaName$BackingStore);

/** * Release any prepared statements acquired by this connection. *

* Resets the prepared statements so they can acquire the new value of * setDbSchemaName(). */ void releasePreparedStatements();
